name: com.ezg.texture-format-override
description: Editor window (menu Tools ▸ EZG Technical Art ▸ Texture Format Override) for batch-applying texture import settings to the current Project-window selection — selected textures and/or folders (recursive optional). Accepts any TextureImporter asset (png, psd, jpg, tga, exr…). Offers two mutually-exclusive modes: Platform Override — enable the Android and iOS override tabs and set their format, compression quality, and (optionally) max size, plus a PSD remove-matte toggle; or Custom Max Size — set the Default tab's Max Texture Size (32–4096 slider) and force NPOT scale to None. Reimports are batched via AssetDatabase.StartAssetEditing.
